## Problem

What engineering or shipping problem are you trying to solve?

## Current closest fit

Which existing skill or workflow is closest today?

## Requested shape

Describe the behavior, artifact, or operator experience you want instead.

## Example prompt or command

If you already know the phrase you would want to use, put it here.

## Success criteria

What would make this feel done and genuinely useful?

## Context

Links to relevant repos, reports, screenshots, or prior decisions.
